lines.text: It was all plain & clear for the object was in the
eastern sky & the sun just came from behind a cloud
in the west at about sun down & shown upon it. I ran
to my east door & try to distinguish a plane motor or an
sound of motor or a possible crash maybe a few blocks
away. But I heard nothing so I again explained it away
to the F.B.I. here. I could not judge the distance of the object.
Now my own radio has not been working for a
2 weeks; as that I do not recently caught all the news; But
a friend of mine tells me that according to radio news, the
saucers are again appearing. and are now disintergrating.
Now Mr. Hoover if this matter that I shall mention
here is by chance out of your jurisdiction, then I pray
you either mail this to some one (the right one) or put it in
the hands (directly) to some responsible Gov. Official whom
are sure will give the matter serious study and consideration.
When the two tornados hit Woodward Okla some
years ago within a few days or a few weeks of each other, I
at that time on I have theorized that these "Flying Saucers" are
being sent from a Russian base located somewhere on
the Eastern edge of Siberia, Korea or Mongolia, but more
likely some place in Siberia, and are radar controlled. That
the first ones of about the year of the tornados came back to
base there, and that they served a tri-purpose.
No. 1. That the first ones contained instruments to
photograph & simultaneously record distance altitude & temperature.
Thus with data returning via the "saucers" the Russians
may by this means have every foot of our U.S.A. photographed
and our metal areas spotted. No doubt the "saucers" are
built round and like this view from the side would have
only one edge and spin like a top thru the air
with dots around the saucer where I have plotted
the dots. Could be made to open automaticly and scatter
germs, chemicals ice & etc.
No 2. That they may be able to effect our weather our
